evals.prompt: Output from sys.dm_exec_procedure_stats sorted by total CPU. Which procs are the worst, and which ones have high per-execution cost hiding behind low call frequency?
evals.expected_output: Top CPU consumers (R1), top reads (R5), per-execution efficiency analysis (R7-R12) flagging procs with high cost-per-call but low frequency. Pattern detection (R13-R15) for parameter sniffing signals. Output references /sqlplan-review for drill-down.

evals.prompt: Trend data from 4 collection periods over the last week. Which procs are getting worse?
evals.expected_output: Trend analysis (R16-R20) showing CPU/IO/duration regression per proc. Highlights newly-appearing procs or those whose metrics doubled. Recommends Query Store review for plan-level cause.
